problem id: b1b095ea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11111010 -> 01111110
  10010101 -> 10000101
  10110000 -> 00101100
  10110101 -> 10001101
  01100010 -> 01011000
  00100010 -> 01001000
  11011111 -> 11010111
  10001100 -> 10100011

query: 00111100
predicted answer: 10001111
